summary: I entered reconfigure mode for route X-01, updated its status to open and saved the result; afterwards attempts to call the external verify endpoint failed with HTTP 400 errors.
error: 400 Client Error: Bad Request for url: https://hub.ag3nts.org/verify (occurred twice)
lesson: Follow the required railway sequence (reconfigure → setstatus → save) and validate responses at each step; before calling the verify endpoint, confirm the request payload, URL, and authentication to avoid 400s; normalize route identifiers (case) and add better error handling, retries, and logging of full response bodies for debugging.
